info.title: BTC/USDT Complete OHLCV Dataset – All Timeframes
info.subtitle: Exchange rate for BTC at intervals from 1 month to 1 minute
info.description:
The data is structured into multiple CSV files organized by timeframe containing standard Binance klines (candlestick) data.

**Pair: BTC/USDT**

# Available Timeframes:

Intraday: 1m, 3m, 5m, 15m, 30m

Hourly: 1h, 2h, 4h, 6h, 8h, 12h

Daily & Higher: 1d, 3d, 1w, 1M

Columns Description:
Each CSV file contains the following columns:

| Column | Description |
| -- | -- |
| timestamp | Open time of the candle in milliseconds (Unix timestamp) |
| open | Price at the beginning of the interval | 
| high | Highest price during the interval | 
| low | Lowest price during the interval | 
| close | Price at the end of the interval |
| volume | Total volume of BTC traded |
| close_time | Close time of the candle in milliseconds |
| quote_asset_volume | Total volume of USDT traded |
| number_of_trades | Number of individual trades executed during the interval |
| taker_buy_base_asset_volume | Volume of BTC bought by takers |
| taker_buy_quote_asset_volume | Volume of USDT spent by takers |

# Potential Use Cases
- Algorithmic Trading Backtesting – Test strategies across multiple timeframes, from high-frequency scalping (1m, 5m) to swing trading (1d, 1w)
- Market Microstructure Analysis – Use taker_buy_volume and number_of_trades to analyze buying pressure and market activity
- Time Series Forecasting – Build LSTM, Transformer, or other forecasting models to predict BTC price movements
- Volatility & Liquidity Analysis – Study Bitcoin's market behavior across different market conditions

# Data Source
Data is sourced from the Binance public API.
